title: Joe and Michael Regroup
summary: Joe and Michael discussed leveraging a document Vinnie liked for content deliverables and timelines for budget acquisition. They also addressed database hygiene and financial resources. Joe conveyed Vinnie's preference for a dedicated in-house team, which conflicted with Michael's commitments, leading to a discussion about his employment agreement and compensation.

decisions.description: Michael will develop a list of two or three priorities with associated costs and timelines for budget approval.
Michael will provide Vinnie with an endpoint for the assessment lead magnet quickly if Matt provides it.
Focus on database hygiene to improve email campaign results, requiring financial resources for tools and processes.
Michael will identify and look up contacts (GMs) from Burles Nissan, Matt Bowers Hyundai Gulfport, Matt Bowers Chevy Metairie, and Northway Toyota.
Use a 50% closing rate from SQLs for projections.

actionItems.task: Create a list of two or three priorities with estimated cost and time frame and develop a framework for the strategy.

expectedOutcome.description: Document outlining priorities, costs, timelines, and strategy framework for Vinnie's review.

actionItems.task: Talk to Vinnie about Michael's compensation plan and the plan for building out the team.

expectedOutcome.description: Vinnie's feedback and decisions regarding compensation and team structure.

actionItems.task: Give Vinnie an update on Monday regarding the marketing team and strategy conversation.

expectedOutcome.description: Vinnie is updated on the team strategy

actionItems.task: Look up the GMs from Hyundai, Gulfport, Chevy, Meteory, and Berles, Nissan.

expectedOutcome.description: List of GMs from target dealerships added to the CRM.

tensions: Vinnie's preference for a fully dedicated in-house marketing team conflicting with Michael's existing commitments.
Michael's dissatisfaction with their compensation plan.
Joe and Michael disagreeing on the origin of Michael's employment agreement.
Concerns about data contamination within Zoho.
Conflicting information received by Michael from Vinnie.
referencesToPast: Positive feedback Vinnie provided on information sent by Paulo.
Prior materials leveraged for blog content and podcasts.
Review of SQL data from previous months and years.
Reference to report Michael shared many months ago
Mention of previous month's team changes with Sergey and Matt.
